subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: In the Book of the Zend-Avesta the Zoroastrians are awaiting the Coming of two Manifestations.... Moses said that after him should come Joshua. The Christ said, addressing Peter... My assistance is the assistance of the Blessed Perfection.
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @twin Manifestations, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @return of Christ; second coming of Christ
